history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A serene and immersive underwater scene captured from behind two figures, silhouetted against a vibrant blue aquarium. The foreground features the dark silhouettes of two people, their heads close together, gazing into the depths. They appear to be a couple or close friends, sharing a moment of wonder.

The background is dominated by a large aquarium teeming with life. Numerous fish, rendered in shades of shimmering blue and white, swim in various directions, creating a dynamic and hypnotic effect. Schools of smaller, slender fish are clustered near the top, while larger, more elongated fish, some resembling barracudas or mackerels, are visible in the mid-ground and lower sections. Two decorative, rope-like structures with small bulbous elements hang vertically in the water, adding a touch of artificiality to the naturalistic setting.

The lighting is predominantly a deep, ethereal blue, characteristic of aquarium tanks, with subtle highlights on the fish that suggest their scales are catching the light. This blue palette creates a tranquil yet awe-inspiring atmosphere. The overall style is realistic, with a focus on the interplay of light and shadow, and the sense of depth within the aquarium. The mood is peaceful, contemplative, and enchanting, evoking a feeling of being transported to another world. The image has a slightly soft focus, enhancing the dreamlike quality of the underwater environment.
